# MCP Configuration · US1001

<!-- wi_id:US1001 updated:2026-04-22 -->

## Summary
Set up Model Context Protocol (MCP) configurations for multiple LLM providers and IDEs (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok) to enable memory sharing and project understanding across new sessions; automate MCP configuration during project creation with provider-specific templates.
